ddls:
CREATE TABLE "relocation_types" (
  "relocation_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relocation type */,
  "relocation_type" TEXT /* Name of the relocation type (e.g., R_AMDGPU_NONE, R_AMDGPU_ABS32_LO) */,
  "kind" TEXT /* Kind of relocation type (e.g., None, Static, Dynamic) */,
  "value" INTEGER /* Value associated with the relocation type */,
  "field" TEXT /* Field (e.g., none, word32, word64) */,
  "calculation" TEXT /* Calculation method for the relocation type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the relocation type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the relocation type is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the relocation type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the relocation type */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created or last updated the relocation type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relocation_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "relocation_type_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "relocation_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the relocation type being changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who made the change */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the changed field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the changed field */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field that was changed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_relocation_type_history_relocation_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("relocation_type_id") REFERENCES relocation_types ("relocation_type_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each relocation type
Name of the relocation type (e.g., R_AMDGPU_NONE, R_AMDGPU_ABS32_LO)
Kind of relocation type (e.g., None, Static, Dynamic)
